headline: Here’s Why 3M (MMM) is Among the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In
summary: 3M Company (NYSE:MMM) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In. On June 23, 2026, 3M Company (NYSE:MMM) and Airbus signed a long-term supply agreement for the Airbus A220. Under the agreement, 3M will provide thermal and acoustic insulation solutions for the aircraft cabin. The thermal materials are intended to […]
